public_note: Redacted sample for portfolio display. Full raw chat logs and full object set are local only.

sample_objects.title: AI content production workflow
sample_objects.summary: A group member described a full AI content workflow from topic selection to publishing. The object is kept because it is a reusable workflow case, not just a daily-chat highlight.

evidence_quotes.566: [redacted quote: workflow setup and quality gates]

sample_objects.title: Claude account and IP risk
sample_objects.summary: Multiple messages described account risk and IP instability. It is stored as a risk object because future workflows need to account for environment and access constraints.
sample_objects.next_action: Track access-risk handling in future agent workflows.
